use_codes.desc: A METHOD FOR INDUCING A REGIONAL ANAESTHESIA VIA INTRATHECAL ADMINISTRATION OF A PATENTED PRESERVATIVE FREE SOLUTION FOR INJECTION (WITH A SPECIFIC COMPOSITION, PH, OSMOLALITY AND DENSITY) CONTAINING 9-11 MG/ML CHLOROPROCAINE HCL

indications.text:
CLOROTEKAL® (chloroprocaine hydrochloride) is indicated for intrathecal injection for the
production of subarachnoid block (spinal anesthesia) in adults undergoing surgical procedures.
Indicated procedures include those suitable for CLOROTEKAL’s short duration of action.
